description_long: This is a flat-brimmed snapback cap with a black crown and a deep red brim. The front panel features bold, white embroidered text reading 'TOP NEP' in a playful, hand-drawn style. A small, round sticker is affixed to the top of the brim, indicating authenticity or branding, and the button on the crown matches the red of the brim. The back of the cap has an adjustable snap closure, typical of snapback designs, allowing for size adjustment. The overall construction appears to be structured, with reinforced front panels and a firm, flat brim. The materials suggest a blend of cotton or polyester fabric with a plastic snap closure and a cardboard or plastic insert in the brim for rigidity.
description: A black and red snapback cap with 'TOP NEP' embroidered on the front and a flat brim, featuring a sticker and adjustable snap closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'TOP NEP' text, red brim with sticker, and black crown.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat red brim, partial text, and the round crown button.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black crown and the adjustable snap closure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat brim and the start of the 'TOP' text.
